name: Media Request
author: grimmdev
description: Adds a Request Media button to the left-hand navigation menu. Users can submit requests for movies, TV shows, music, or any configured media type. Requests are stored server-side and optionally forwarded to a webhook (Discord, Slack, custom).

vars.name: Menu Button Label
vars.description: Text shown on the navigation menu button.

vars.name: Accent Color
vars.description: Color used for the submit button and input focus ring.

vars.name: Media Types
vars.description: Comma-separated list of request types shown in the dropdown. e.g. Movie, TV Show, Music, Anime, Other
vars.default: Movie, TV Show, Music, Anime, Other

vars.name: Webhook URL
vars.description: Optional. POST each new request to this URL (Discord, Slack, or any HTTP endpoint). Leave blank to disable.

vars.name: Webhook Secret
vars.description: Optional. If set, signs the webhook payload with HMAC-SHA256 and adds an X-Hub-Signature-256 header.
